2605.04624.title: AuditRepairBench: A Paired-Execution Trace Corpus for Evaluator-Channel Ranking Instability in Agent Repair
2605.04624.paper_summary: Agent-repair leaderboards reorder under evaluator reconfiguration, and a measurable share of the reordering is produced by methods that consult evaluator-derived signal during internal selection of candidate repairs. We document this failure mode on a public leaderboard and release AuditRepairBench, a paired-execution trace corpus of 576,000 registered cells (96,000 executed) that operationalizes evaluator-channel-blocking ranking instability within a declared observability boundary. A modular screening architecture decides pathway-blocking through four interchangeable implementations, a learned influence proxy, a rule-based channel-exposure ratio that uses no trained model, a counterfactual sensitivity proxy, and a sparse human-audit proxy, combined into a screening posterior that feeds a cell-level flip functional, a set-valued label, a stratified system score, and a set-valued leaderboard. The resource is supported by mechanism-anchored validation on an 80-case source-level channel-surgery subset, an independent-discovery protocol under which two annotator groups separated from the pipeline developers discover coupling patterns blinded to the screening design and the frozen ensemble attains pooled AUROC 0.83 on their 79 cases, implementation robustness, uncertainty propagation that raises 95% coverage from 0.81 to 0.95, and forward transfer with pooled community-evaluator Spearman \r{ho} = 0.65. Screening-guided blinding patches reduce rank displacement by 55--74% (mean 62%) at fewer than 50 lines of code, whereas random channel blinding produces at most 7% reduction and generic retraining at most 13%. AuditRepairBench-Lite, a rule-only configuration on a 12,000-cell subset, preserves the leaderboard at Kendall τ = 0.88 under twenty-four GPU-hours and is the primary release artifact at 42 GB.
2605.04624.paper_summary_zh: 代理修復排行榜在評估者重新配置下重新排序，且可測量的重新排序部分是由在候選修復的內部選擇過程中諮詢評估者衍生信號的方法產生的。我們在一個公共排行榜上記錄了這種失敗模式，並發布了AuditRepairBench，一個包含576,000個註冊單元（96,000個執行）的配對執行追蹤語料庫，該語料庫在宣告的可觀察邊界內實現了評估者通道阻塞排名的不穩定性。一個模組化篩選架構通過四種可互換的實現來決定通道阻塞，包括學習的影響代理、基於規則的通道曝光比率（不使用訓練模型）、反事實敏感性代理和稀疏人類審核代理，這些組合成一個篩選後驗，該後驗輸入到單元級翻轉功能、一組值標籤、一個分層系統分數和一個集合值排行榜。該資源通過在80個案例的源級通道手術子集上進行機制錨定的驗證來支持，這是一個獨立發現協議，其中兩組註釋者與管道開發者分開，發現與篩選設計盲目的耦合模式，並且冷凍的集成在他們的79個案例上達到聚合AUROC 0.83，實施穩健性，從0.81提高到0.95的95%覆蓋的不確定性傳播，以及與聚合社區評估者的前向轉移Spearman \r{ho} = 0.65。篩選引導的盲目修補在少於50行代碼的情況下減少了55-74%的排名位移（平均62%），而隨機通道盲目最多僅減少7%，通用再訓練最多減少13%。AuditRepairBench-Lite，一個僅使用規則的配置，在12,000個單元的子集上，在二十四個GPU小時內保持了Kendall τ = 0.88，是42 GB的主要發布文檔。
2605.04624.author: Yuelin Hu et.al.
2605.04624.authors: Yuelin Hu, Zhenbo Yu, Zhengxue Cheng, Wei Liu, Li Song
